description: Cut a dash with these sandals for the cosmopolitan male from red tape. Styled in sophisticated leather, wear them with stone washed denims, a casual plaid shirt and a stylish hide jacket. Upper High quality leather upper with straps at the forefoot and ankle region Velcro fastening for the ankle straps Stitch detailing on the straps for durability and style Padded footbed with stitch detailing for instep comfort Outsole Branching lugs on the TPR outsole with a raised heel Footbed stitched to the outsole for durability shoe care Use a branded shoe polish to keep your footwear clean Do not store under sunlight
